current_task: Create a Word file with one sentence
knowledge_need: The agent lacks executable knowledge for docx/Word file creation and needs elementary concepts, safe learning steps, validation checks, and return-to-task guidance.
already_checked: active memory no executable docx method; reflex registry read-only only; repo no confirmed docx creation reflex
candidate_knowledge: For task X, the missing knowledge is the elementary method for producing a valid .docx Word document from one sentence using an allowed local mechanism, such as an existing trusted library, Office automation, or a prebuilt reflex if later validated. The agent needs to know that a .docx is not plain text renamed with a .docx extension; it must be a valid Word/OpenXML package with document content, saved to the requested path, then checked before returning to the parent task.
missing_concepts: difference between plain text and valid .docx container
allowed local mechanism for docx creation
target sentence and output path handling
suggested_decomposition: confirm the exact sentence to place in the document
identify one permitted docx creation mechanism
learn the minimal document structure or API action
define where the output file should be written
define validation checks before reporting completion
safe_learning_steps: read local documentation or reflex descriptions for any existing docx/Word creation method
read trusted library documentation conceptually without executing it
compare whether the mechanism creates real .docx files rather than renamed text
identify required inputs: sentence, output path, overwrite policy
record a minimal validation checklist before attempting execution
validation_needed: confirm the output file exists at the expected path
confirm the file is a valid .docx package that Word-compatible tools can open
confirm the document contains exactly the requested sentence
confirm no extra content, macros, or unintended template material were added
return_to_task_hint: After learning and selecting one validated creation method, return to task X by creating only the requested one-sentence Word file, running the defined validation checks, and reporting the artifact path plus validation evidence.
limits: CODEX_DRAFT and NOT_PROVEN_UNTIL_VALIDATED; this did not prove any repo capability, did not select an executable local method, did not create a file, and must not be treated as acceptance evidence.
boundary: CODEX_DRAFT only; agent must validate before acting; template is mandatory.
